title: GitHub Review by sourcery-ai[bot]
external_feedback:
Hey - I've left some high level feedback:

- The new Chainsaw Step 7 for the Flux Web UI is described as "kind overlay ONLY" but is currently unconditional; consider gating this step (e.g., via an overlay label, env flag, or presence check) so runs against non-kind/production clusters don’t fail on missing flux-web resources.
- The renovate-config-validator invocation in tests/unit/renovate/flux_web_chart_custommanager_test.sh pulls Renovate via npx on every run, which may be expensive in local and CI loops; you might want to centralize or cache this validation instead of running it in a per-feature unit test.

<details>
<summary>Prompt for AI Agents</summary>

~~~markdown
Please address the comments from this code review:

## Overall Comments
- The new Chainsaw Step 7 for the Flux Web UI is described as "kind overlay ONLY" but is currently unconditional; consider gating this step (e.g., via an overlay label, env flag, or presence check) so runs against non-kind/production clusters don’t fail on missing flux-web resources.
- The renovate-config-validator invocation in tests/unit/renovate/flux_web_chart_custommanager_test.sh pulls Renovate via npx on every run, which may be expensive in local and CI loops; you might want to centralize or cache this validation instead of running it in a per-feature unit test.
~~~

</details>

***
